2025-05-16T12:28:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Tuen Mun Town Centre which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-16T12:28:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近屯門市中心的部份行車線現已解封。

2025-05-18T00:33:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Fung Tak Road (both bounds) between Po Kong Village Road and Fung Tak Estate access road are closed to all traffic. Affected KMB routes nos. 3B, 10, 11, 11C, 61X, 75X, 82X, 85M, 91M and 671, as well as CTB route nos. A23 and N23 have been diverted. For the latest service arrangement of individual bus routes, members of the public can refer to the information on the bus company's website or mobile application. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
2025-05-18T00:33:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，鳳德道(來回方向)介乎蒲崗村道與鳳德邨通道之間的全線現已封閉。 受影響九巴第3B、10、11、11C、61X、75X、82X、85M、91M及671號線，以及城巴第A23及N23號線須改道⾏駛。有關個別巴⼠路線的最新服務情況，市⺠可參閱巴⼠公司的網⾴或流動應⽤程式內的資訊。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。

2025-05-18T06:28:00.CONTENT_EN:
All lanes of Fung Tak Road (Wong Tai Sin bound) between Po Kong Village Road and Fung Tak Estate access road which were closed due to watermain burst are re-opened to all traffic;
all lanes of Fung Tak Road (Hammer Hill Road bound) between Po Kong Village Road and Fung Tak Estate access road are still closed to all traffic.   Affected bus route(s) has been diverted. For the latest service arrangement of individual bus routes, members of the public can refer to the information on the bus company's website or mobile application.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
2025-05-18T06:28:00.CONTENT_CN:
較早前因水管爆裂而封閉的鳳德道(往黃大仙方向)介乎蒲崗村道與鳳德邨通道之間的全線現已解封;
鳳德道(往斧山道方向)介乎蒲崗村道與鳳德邨通道之間的全線仍然封閉。  受影響巴士路線須改道行駛。有關個別巴⼠路線的最新服務情況，市⺠可參閱巴⼠公司的網⾴或流動應⽤程式內的資訊。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。

2025-05-18T08:04:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , the slow lane of Fung Tak Road (Hammer Hill Road bound) between Po Kong Village Road and Fung Tak Estate access road is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Affected bus route(s) has(have) been diverted. Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-18T08:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，鳳德道(往斧山道方向)介乎蒲崗村道與鳳德邨通道之間的慢線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 受影響巴士路線須改道行駛。 現時上址交通繁忙。
